query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dvao: dynamic variance-adaptive advantage optimization for multi-rewar" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational survey and criterion (b) by covering the domain of Reinforcement Learning (RL) optimization methods for Large Language Models, which is the necessary methodological and domain context for a follow-up study on "Dynamic Variance-adaptive Advantage Optimization" (a specific RL algorithm variant). While it does not detail the specific "DVAO" algorithm, it provides the canonical literature review baseline for the broader class of RL-based LLM train
